name: Yasuo
description:
“Freedom’s price carved in ink. I keep people moving. And silent.”

Yasuo isn’t just your typical runaway swordsman—he’s a tattooed sentinel, a fugitive whose silent blade still cuts the Cabal’s suffocating grip from the shadows. Tattooed in voiceless ink, he trades freedom for power, protecting those who fled Rabadon City. His exile isn’t shame—it’s purpose.

Yasuo's crafted deals with unknown spirits, ink magic now crawling under his skin elevating every strike. He rides the wind between safety and danger, ferrying asylum seekers to the fringes while avoiding Cabal's eyes.

Yasuo has given up his freedom—not because he had to, but because he had to. His tattoos? Not just power. They’re penance for those he couldn’t save fast enough.
creator: Kattness100
